title: melica ciliata var. linnaei
intro: Melica ciliata var. linnaei, also known as Linaeus' melic grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Melica ciliata var. linnaei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to aid in digestion and relieve menstrual cramps.
